title: Define .taskulus.yml single-file configuration behaviors
description: Specify behaviors for the new single configuration file .taskulus.yml located at repository root. No fallbacks or alternate filenames. Include project directory key (default project/) and required structure for hierarchy/workflows/priorities. Update Gherkin specs accordingly.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Progress 2026-02-13: Implemented single-file .taskulus.yml configuration across specs and loaders (Python+Rust). Updated initialization to create .taskulus.yml with default config, loader now requires file (no fallback), project_directory/external_projects supported. Updated Behave/Cucumber steps accordingly. Ran cargo fmt (rust/Cargo.toml) and python3 -m black on python/src and python/features/steps. Docs and broader test runs still pending.
